description_long: This is a vintage gramophone-style record player featuring a large, flared green horn with white decorative accents, mounted on a wooden base. The horn is attached to a curved, ornate metal arm that connects to the main body, which houses a circular turntable platter. The wooden base is rectangular with a brass or gold-colored plate on the front and visible metal hardware, including a winding handle and a lever. The turntable platter is metallic and slightly raised, with a visible spindle at its center. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century phonographs, combining wood, metal, and painted finishes for a classic, antique appearance.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large green horn, ornate metal arm, and a wooden base with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide green horn, the turntable platter, and the brass plate on the wooden base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the horn, the ornate metal arm, and the winding handle protruding from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the horn, the full length of the tonearm, and the back panel of the wooden base.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the horn's side, the platter, and the tonearm extending over the base.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and metallic with a slightly raised profile and a central spindle. It appears to be made of metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a dull silver finish. The platter is proportionally smaller than the horn but occupies a central position on the wooden base. There are no visible grooves or elaborate patterns, but the surface is smooth and slightly reflective.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, long, and curved, made of metal with an ornate design near its base. It is positioned to the right of the platter and extends over it, appearing to be in a resting or ready-to-play position. The finish is a light metallic color, matching the aesthetic of the era.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its location at the end of the tonearm is implied by the design.
attribute_control_knobs: There is a visible winding handle on the side of the wooden base, made of metal and wood, as well as a lever on the top surface. No other control knobs or buttons are visible.
